name: cuteblock
description: CuteBlock is a playful browser extension that replaces obvious ad containers with cute animal photos instead of collapsing the page layout.

scripts.check:static: npm run build && node --check content.js && node --check popup.js && node scripts/check-engine.mjs && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8')); console.log('manifest ok')"
scripts.package: npm run check:static && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-extension.ps1
